content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) [ProductKey]
,[OrderDateKey]
,[CustomerKey]
,[SalesAmount]
 FROM [dbo].[FactInternetSales]


 INSERT INTO dbo.FactInternetSales
(
    ProductKey,
    OrderDateKey,
    CustomerKey,
    SalesAmount
)
VALUES
(
    1001,          -- ProductKey
    20251029,      -- OrderDateKey (e.g., YYYYMMDD format)
    501,           -- CustomerKey
    199.99         -- SalesAmount
);
